title: desmos chinensis var. latifolia
intro: Desmos chinensis var. latifolia, also known as the Chinese starfruit or five-angled fruit, is a variety of the Desmos chinensis plant, belonging to the family Annonaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Desmos chinensis var. latifolia include reducing fever, alleviating cough and respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
